title: Load dashboard root page
description: Verifies the SPA dashboard loads when navigating to the root route.

steps.description: Verify the dashboard page primary content is displayed

title: Load dashboard index.html directly
description: Verifies the dashboard loads when navigating directly to the index HTML route.

steps.description: Verify the dashboard page primary content is displayed

title: Load main JavaScript asset
description: Verifies the main JavaScript asset can be requested directly and renders as a JavaScript response in the browser.

steps.description: Verify the page displays JavaScript source content

title: Missing static asset returns not found page
description: Verifies a missing static asset route shows a not found response in the browser.

steps.description: Verify a not found error page is displayed
